text:
Pietro (ピエトロ, Pietoro) Hunter × Hunter - Episode 7 (1999) was a close friend of Leorio. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 1, Chapter 7 

Background

Pietro died from a debilitating illness. His passing left Leorio feeling deeply remorseful about being unable to save his friend, as the illness was entirely curable, but required a surgery he could not afford. Since then, Leorio aspires to become a doctor and takes part in the 287th Hunter Exam. 

Plot

Hunter Exam arc

After a long run in the Zaban tunnel, the Hunter Exam candidates begin to climb a long staircase, and while they do, Leorio also talks with Kurapika. He tells him his only goal is money, but Kurapika knows he's lying. With a little push, Leorio tells his story and mentions his friend who died for lack of medical care. He wants to become a doctor, but needs money and a Hunter License to become one. 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

Pietro is his name in the 1999 anime adaptation. In the manga and 2011 anime adaptation, Hunter × Hunter - Episode 4 (2011) his name was never mentioned.

Anime and Manga Differences

While in the anime adaptations Pietro somehow appears, in the manga he's only mentioned indirectly. 
In a filler sequence of the 1999 anime adaptation, Tonpa traps Leorio in the Zaban tunnel, and due to the sap of the Illusion Tree, he starts to see hallucinations with Pietro. 
In the 1999 anime adaptation, seemingly both Leorio and Pietro were adults during the latter's death, implying that Leorio's dream of becoming a doctor is a fairly recent one. In the 2011 anime adaptation, Pietro passed away while they were still children or in their early teens. 

Translations around the World
